/usr/bin/c++      -arch arm64     -Wno-deprecated-declarations     -Wno-unused-command-line-argument     -Wno-unused-parameter     -Wno-char-subscripts -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/Text.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/Media.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/Shape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/Setup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/TimeSolat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/TarikhHijrah.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/ResourcePath.mm.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/LoadManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/LayoutManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/BeepUtil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/layouts/LayoutBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/layouts/DefaultLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/layouts/LectureLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/layouts/UpcomingLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/layouts/EventLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/layouts/SlideshowLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/layouts/PrayerAlertLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/layouts/DeathNoticeLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WaktuSolat.dir/src/layouts/IqamahLayout.cpp.o -o WaktuSolat.app/Contents/MacOS/WaktuSolat   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/sfml@2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/sfml@2/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml@2/lib/libsfml-graphics.2.6.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml@2/lib/libsfml-window.2.6.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml@2/lib/libsfml-audio.2.6.2.dylib -framework CoreFoundation -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml@2/lib/libsfml-system.2.6.2.dylib
